creator: cem@freebsd.org
text:
Yes, it just does basic recognition of the filesystem at this time.

 67         /*
 68          * Reading the volume label requires walking the root directory to look
 69          * for a special label file.  Left as an exercise for the reader.
 70          */

It's unclear if traversing the root directory of an exfat volume is covered under Microsoft's exfat patents.
